Who I Am

Where Health Meets Technology

I'm Favour Oluwapamilerin Akintade — a Public Health professional, Virtual Healthcare Assistant, and Frontend Engineer based in Lagos, Nigeria. My work sits at the intersection of health systems and digital innovation.

With internships across the Lagos State Ministry of Health, Public Health Headquarters in Abuja, and primary healthcare facilities, I've developed hands-on experience in disease surveillance, community health coordination, monitoring & evaluation, and patient documentation.

On the technology side, I design and build accessible, user-centered web applications — combining my health background to create tools that serve real human needs. My dual expertise means I think about people first, whether I'm writing code or writing a health program report.

Background

Professional Journey

2022Public Health
Public Health Intern
Public Health Headquarters, Garki, Abuja

Gained exposure to Epidemiology, Disease Control, and Environmental & Occupational Health divisions. Observed public health surveillance systems and infectious disease monitoring frameworks. Supported departmental documentation.

2023Public Health
Public Health Intern
Paelon Amai Primary Healthcare Facility, Delta State

Assisted with patient intake documentation and medical records management. Delivered health education sessions during antenatal and postnatal clinics. Supported clinic workflow coordination and appointment tracking.

2024Public Health
Public Health Intern — State Supervisor
Lagos State Ministry of Health, Alausa

Participated in the Neglected Tropical Diseases (NTD) control program. Appointed State Supervisor overseeing Community Health Workers at Local Government level. Monitored medication distribution and contributed to M&E of program implementation.

2025Virtual Health Asst
Personal Assistant & Virtual Healthcare Support
Office of the Senior Special Assistant to the Ondo State Governor on Volunteer Service

Managed executive scheduling and healthcare initiative coordination. Prepared healthcare briefing documents and structured reports. Maintained secure digital filing systems and coordinated volunteer-driven health outreach activities.

2025Professional Dev
Certificate of Attendance — ESCAIDE 2025
European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC)

Attended the European Scientific Conference on Applied Infectious Disease Epidemiology (ESCAIDE 2025). Gained international exposure to applied epidemiology, infectious disease science, and European public health frameworks.

Jan 2026 Professional Certificate
IBM Java Developer — Professional Certificate
IBM & Coursera  ·  Verify Certificate ↗

Completed 11-course IBM Professional Certificate covering full-stack Java development. Built and deployed Java applications using Spring Framework, integrated HTML/CSS/JavaScript front-ends with Java back-ends, leveraged Cloud, Docker containers, and microservices for scalable solutions. Used Git/GitHub for version control and developed applications with relational and NoSQL database backends.

OngoingVolunteer
Public & Community Health Advocate
RED Foundation

Supported community outreach initiatives and health awareness campaigns. Assisted in organizing programs, maintaining participant records, and contributing to data collection and reporting activities.

Hospitality · Full-Stack · Next.js

Royal Moss Hotel

A full-featured luxury hotel website for Royal Moss Hotel, Badagry, Lagos. Includes a live room booking system with real-time availability, multi-page navigation (Rooms & Suites, Gallery, Services, Contact, FAQ), guest reviews, amenities showcase, Google Maps integration, contact form, and newsletter signup. Built with a clean, elegant UI befitting a 5-star brand. Built by Favour Oluwapamilerin Akintade.

That Local Girl

Based in York, Ontario, Canada. Built by Favour Oluwapamilerin Akintade.
